description.en: Exploring how language is actually learned, and building a system from the ground up focused on perception and real understanding.
description.zh: 探索語言實際是如何被學習的，並從最底層建立一個以感知與真實理解為核心的學習系統。

description.en: Documenting my attempt to build a game from scratch with little experience. Learning by doing, experimenting in real time, and figuring things out along the way.
description.zh: 記錄我從零開始做遊戲的過程。在經驗不足的情況下，一邊做一邊學，透過實驗與嘗試逐步摸索方向。

description.en: Documenting my attempt to improve my body from the ground up—fixing weaknesses in movement, building strength, and developing a more complete physique.
description.zh: 記錄我從基礎開始重新打造身體的過程，修正動作上的弱點、提升力量，並建立更完整且均衡的體態。
